Question_KR (상황 중심): 인생 첫 무대에 오르기 직전! 링 위 조명이 나를 비춘다면?
Option_A (본능/공격/열정): "드디어 내 세상이다!" 근거 없는 자신감 폭발
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): "실수하면 안 돼." 머릿속 시뮬레이션 무한 반복
Question_EN (Scenario-based): Your first big stage! The spotlight hits you. How do you feel?
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): "My time is now!" Bursting with confidence.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): "Don't mess up." Simulating every move in my head.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 누군가 내 실력을 '무근본'이라며 비난한다! 나의 반응은?
Question_EN (Scenario-based): Someone calls your skills "trash." What's your immediate reaction?
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): "What did you say?" Show them what I've got.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): (Ignore) "Keep barking." Wait for the perfect revenge.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 게임 캐릭터를 고른다면? 성능보다는 역시 '간지'가 중요하지!
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): 안 맞고 때리는 얄미운 컨트롤 장인
Question_EN (Scenario-based): Picking a game character? It's all about the "cool factor"!
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): A "Control Master" who hits without getting hit.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 체력이 바닥난 마감 직전! 나를 움직이게 하는 원동력은?
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): "연습한 대로만 가자." 나 자신에 대한 냉정한 신뢰
Question_EN (Scenario-based): At your physical limit right before a deadline! What moves you?
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): "Losing is not an option!" Burning competitive spirit.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): "Just do as practiced." Cold self-trust in my prep.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 좁은 골목에서 험악한 사람과 눈이 마주쳤다! 피할 것인가?
Option_A (본능/공격/열정): "어디 한 번..." 눈 피하지 않고 당당하게 직진
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): 괜히 힘 빼지 말자. 슬쩍 비켜가며 마찰 차단
Question_EN (Scenario-based): You meet a tough guy in a dark alley. What's your move?
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): "Bring it on..." Walk straight without breaking eye contact.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): Why waste energy? Slide past and avoid friction.

Question_EN (Scenario-based): A friend suggests a reckless challenge. "Just do it!"
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): "I'm in! Let's go!" Learn by doing on the spot.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): "Hold on.." Analyze risks and make a plan first.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 모두가 안 된다는 '불가능한 프로젝트'를 맡게 되었다!
Option_A (본능/공격/열정): "내가 된다는 걸 보여주지!" 이 악물고 버틴다
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): "안 되는 건 안 되는 것." 효율적인 우회로 탐색
Question_EN (Scenario-based): Assigned an "Impossible Project" that everyone says will fail.
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): "I'll prove them wrong!" Grit my teeth and endure.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): "If it's no, it's no." Find an efficient pivot.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 친구와 가위바위보 승부! 오늘 간식비가 걸려있다면?
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): 상대의 습관을 파악해 이길 확률을 계산한다
Question_EN (Scenario-based): Rock-Paper-Scissors with a friend! Winner gets free snacks!
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): Mostly Rock! Overpower them with my "Spirit."
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): Observe their habits and calculate the probability.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 가장 짜릿한 성취감을 느낄 때는 언제인가요?
Option_A (본능/공격/열정): 모든 걸 쏟아부어 하얗게 불태웠을 때
Option_B (전략/기술/냉정): 내 계획과 계산이 소름 돋게 딱딱 맞았을 때
Question_EN (Scenario-based): When do you feel the most electric sense of achievement?
Option_A (Instinct/Agg/Passion): When I've poured everything out and burned bright.
Option_B (Strategy/Tech/Logic): When my plan and calculations hit perfectly.

Question_KR (상황 중심): 힘든 하루를 마치고 거울 속 나에게 날리는 한 마디는?
Question_EN (Scenario-based): After a long day, what do you say to yourself in the mirror?
